description:
Legal record (#37) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 9v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the first third of Nisan 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #37) Partnership agreement between Nissim b. Moshe Sofino and ʿImmanuʾel aka Confrado Munes. The partnership will last two years and centers on an initial investment of 15 şerifi that Nissim received from ʿImmanuʾel. The agreement has the structure of an investment partnership (עסקא) but is not labeled as such. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
